Petition To Modfiy Trust
Off Calendar Apr-28-2014 Denied
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Ross Madden for and with Ava Soifer.

Mr. Madden presented oral argument to support his position with regard to the 401K being treated as a Trust. The Petition to Modify Trust was taken under submission.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy Barrientos. (Not Reported)
